description: CompositionPurple and black cardigan made of 100% acrylic, has three-quarter sleeves that have ribbed hems, and a three-buttoned enclosure holding the two sides of the neckline in placeFitSlimWash careWash, dry and iron inside outMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryWelcome the winter in style with this cardigan from jealous 21. The knit acrylic traps the body heat and keeps the chill away, while the fabric feels soft on the skin and keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes and face the winter chill in style and comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in cardigansHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
